title: Create: Diesel Generators Sound Replacement
description: Give the diesel generators a bit more oomph!
body:
#

Create: Diesel Generators Sound Replacement

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available_for-1.18.2--1.21.1-blue) ![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod_Loader-any-orange) This resource pack swaps the engine sounds for the mod [Create: Diesel Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-diesel-generators) with new sound files that have a bit more oomph compared to the originals. Designed to give the feel of a more authentic diesel engine. ## > Since the 1.3.3 update for [Create: Diesel Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-diesel-generators) the default sounds are already pretty good, but this resource pack still modifies them to my liking. Maybe you will prefer these sounds as well.
